product.name: Arox T1 Static Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny robocze funkcyjne — antystatyczne i hydrofobowe
product.categorySourceGroup: Polyester Woven Fabrics for Raincoats, Jackets and Coveralls
product.specLine: 110 g/m², 99% Polyester 1% Carbon, Antistatic, 3/2 S Twill Fabric
descriptions: 99% polyester 1% carbon, antistatic ESD workwear twill fabric.
Arox T1 Static pro fabrics are mostly used for clean room's cloths.
Suitable for antistatic ESD application like electronic industry, certified for EN ISO 1149-5.
110 g/m², 99% Polyester 1% Carbon, Antistatic, 3/2 S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 400N ; Weft > 300N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 20N ; Weft > 15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
functionIconLabels: >> Arox T1 Static Pro Data Sheet

evidence: Suitable for antistatic ESD application like electronic industry, certified for EN ISO 1149-5
matches.rationale: Explicitly positioned for ESD/electronic industry antistatic protection, which relates to electrical/electronic environments, though not explicitly framed as energy-sector utility work.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Described for 'clean room's cloths' which could relate to controlled environments including pharma/medical, but no explicit medical/healthcare use is stated.
Antistatic property alone does not establish energy-sector use per exclusion rules; ESD/electronics context is closer to industrial cleanroom than energy utilities.
